transcript.content: 已经接上了。 我改了两层：
为什么 和 Project Assistant 有关系？
因为我刚才找到并能直接修改的“状态栏宿主代码”，不是 OpenAI 官方 Codex 扩展本体，而是你本机装的这个扩展： - `~/.codex/skills/project-assistant/integrations/vscode-host/extension.js`
单独做，不要碰assitant 要有边界；
单独扩展已经做了，而且 `Project Assistant` 那边的误接线我已经撤回了。 现在机器上多了一个独立 VS Code 扩展：
这两个做重了吧，应该合并成1个； 先简短展示，点击后，出一个小窗口，在展示详情； 可以自己动态更新的； live pannel.md可以去除掉了；
已经按你说的收成一条了： - `Project Assistant` 的接线我撤回了 - 改成一个独立扩展 `Codex Context Monitor` - 状态栏现在应该只做 `简短展示` - 点击后打开 `小窗口详情` - 详情窗口会跟着后台轮询自动更新 - `live-panel.md` 已经删掉，不再作为主入口
打开新窗口后 Codex Context Monitor 会自动更新到新窗口么？
会，但有边界。 按现在这个 standalone 扩展的实现：
codex context meter 删除掉； 新窗口不是这个仓库时，状态栏直接显示 Ctx: no workspace =》要 tooltip 里写清楚当前绑定的是哪个 workspace 路径 =〉要 果你同时开两个窗口：两个窗口各自独立刷新，各看各自 workspace =》需要
已经改了，而且只改独立扩展。 现在的行为是：

decision.archive_summary: Active task is the standalone VS Code extension for Codex context, explicitly separated from Project Assistant. Earlier resolved design decisions: do not touch Project Assistant; merge overlapping UI into one extension; keep the status bar display brief; open a small detail window on click; allow dynamic/live updates there; remove live-panel.md as the main entry. Current active requirements from the latest user request: remove the old codex context meter, show 'Ctx: no workspace' when a new window is not in the target repo/workspace, include the currently bound workspace path in the tooltip, and ensure two VS Code windows refresh independently against their own workspaces.
decision.reasoning_summary: This is the same active implementation thread, so relation=continue. The raw next-turn context mainly needs the current requirement turn and the assistant's latest status response; older turns are mostly resolved setup/history. Their durable constraints should survive as compact pins: standalone extension boundary, merged single-extension UI with brief status + click-for-details, and the latest per-window/workspace behavior requirements.
